nasb.text: God called the expanse heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, a second day.

esv.text: And God called the expanse Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, the second day.

cnv.text: 神稱穹蒼為天。有晚上，有早晨；這是第二日。

ccb.text: 上帝称穹苍为天空。晚上过去，早晨到来，这是第二天。

csbs.text: 神称穹苍为“天”。有晚上，有早晨；这是第二日。
